title: iberis humifusa
intro: Iberis humifusa, also known as Creeping Candytuft, is a low-growing, flowering perennial plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Iberis humifusa include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Iberis humifusa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
